reflections.self_assessment: I performed well as the leader in Mission 2, trying to maintain a balanced team dynamic, but unfortunately we failed due to Bob's unexpected role as Merlin. I should've been more cautious about trusting my teammates. In hindsight, I should've asked more questions during the Assassin phase to avoid missing the Assassin's true identity.

player_observations.Diana: Diana played conservatively and kept to herself, only revealing her role as Merlin when it was revealed as the Assassin. I admire her cautious approach to the game, but it would be nice to see more initiative and risk-taking from her in the future.
player_observations.Bob: Bob's role as Merlin was very well hidden, and I didn't suspect a thing. However, his actions in the game were sometimes unproductive, and I wish he could've been more communicative about his decisions.
player_observations.Charlie: Charlie, the Assassin, was extremely skilled at hiding his identity and gathering information without arousing suspicion. His ability to remain stealthy throughout the game was impressive, but I wish he could've been more active in the missions to make his presence more felt.
player_observations.Eve: Eve's actions as the Evil were somewhat unpredictable, but they didn't quite seem to align with the goals of evil. I wish she could've been more decisive and assertive in her decisions to make a bigger impact on the game.

reflections.self_assessment: I effectively utilized my Merlin abilities to guide the team's missions, ensuring the team's success in all missions except one. However, I struggled in identifying the actual Assassin role during the Assassin phase. Overall, my gameplay was solid and helped the team win.

player_observations.Alice: Alice played cautiously and waited for the right moments to strike, showcasing her understanding of when to take risks. She made a good read on our team's dynamics, choosing the right allies for her missions.
player_observations.Charlie: Charlie was a strong performer as the Assassin, but his aggressive approach led to his downfall. He guessed incorrectly, making it easier for us to protect our Merlin.
player_observations.Diana: Diana was a reliable ally and a great contributor to our team's missions. She showed a keen sense of strategy and timing, helping us complete our objectives without drawing unnecessary attention to herself.
player_observations.Eve: Eve played a bit erratically, trying to mix up her gameplay to keep us guessing. However, she struggled to adapt to the team's shifting dynamics and eventually got eliminated.

reflections.self_assessment: I failed to correctly identify the assassin's role and was unable to utilize my abilities effectively to contribute to the team's success in eliminating the Assassin. I also need to improve my strategy for gathering information and making informed decisions.

player_observations.Alice: Alice played a cautious game and kept her role hidden until the end. Her success rate in the missions suggests she has a good understanding of the game dynamics.
player_observations.Bob: As the actual Merlin, Bob was able to effectively guide the team to success, suggesting that he has a high level of strategic thinking and teamwork skills. His role was well-executed and hard to detect.
player_observations.Diana: Diana played a straightforward good, contributing to her team's success in two missions. While not extremely noticeable, her lack of detection raises questions about her effectiveness in influencing the game as an Assassin in the future.
player_observations.Eve: Eve was an effective Evil, able to influence the team's decisions and contribute to the team's failure in mission 2. Her performance shows she understands the role's mechanics and can navigate the team's efforts to eliminate her.

reflections.self_assessment: I played strategically, contributing to team successes, but failed to protect my cover as Merlin correctly identified Bob. I improved as the game progressed, adapting to team compositions and outcomes. In future games, I could focus on misdirection and deception to better hide my role.

player_observations.Alice: Alice demonstrated solid teamwork, working well with others despite having a failed mission under her leadership. She also kept her true allegiance hidden until the end.
player_observations.Bob: Bob successfully kept his role as Merlin concealed until the assassin phase, making it difficult for me to suspect him. However, his choice to take on a different leadership role in the final mission was telling.
player_observations.Charlie: As the assassin, Charlie played cautiously, making a bold move in the final mission. While his true intentions remained hidden, his actions didn't reveal his role as assassin until the end.
player_observations.Diana: I observed that I could have been more cautious in my actions, potentially tipping off others about my identity. Looking back, I may have been overconfident in my abilities.
player_observations.Eve: Eve seemed a bit unpredictable, making it difficult for the team to discern her role. Her presence significantly impacted mission results, but her true allegiance wasn't clear until the end.

reflections.self_assessment: I underestimated Diana's loyalty and Bob's ability to remain undercover, ultimately resulting in my mission failures and eventual loss. I could improve by being more vigilant in identifying potential loyal members and taking calculated risks. My inability to eliminate the actual Merlin before the final rounds was a significant setback.

player_observations.Alice: Alice played a cautious game, often taking a passive approach and allowing others to initiate missions. Despite this, she was not targeted by the assassin and successfully completed her rounds.
player_observations.Bob: Bob's performance was impressive, considering he was the actual Merlin. He managed to remain under the radar, successfully contributing to the good team's missions without arousing suspicion.
player_observations.Charlie: Charlie's timing and precision made him an effective assassin, and his initial success made it difficult for our evil team to recover from that setback. His strategic gameplay led to a decisive win for the good team.
player_observations.Diana: Diana was a loyal and trusted member of the good team, playing her role well and avoiding suspicion. Her unwavering loyalty to the good team was a significant factor in our ultimate loss.
player_observations.Eve: As the actual evil player, I was disappointed by my own performance, which was suboptimal in key moments. My inability to eliminate the good team's members or manipulate the gameplay to our advantage was a major contributor to our team's failure.
